name: create_view
description: Create a new view for an object. Views define how records are displayed. For KANBAN views, mainGroupByFieldName is required and must be a SELECT field (e.g., "stage", "status"). For CALENDAR views, calendarFieldName and calendarLayout are required.

objectNameSingular.description: Object name this view is for (e.g., "task", "person", "company")

mainGroupByFieldName.description: Field name to group by (required for KANBAN views, must be a SELECT field, e.g., "stage", "status")

kanbanAggregateOperationFieldName.description: Field name for the kanban aggregate operation (e.g., "amount")

calendarLayout.description: Calendar layout (required for CALENDAR views, e.g., "DAY", "WEEK", "MONTH")

calendarFieldName.description: Date field name to use for the calendar (required for CALENDAR views, must be a DATE or DATE_TIME field, e.g., "createdAt", "dueAt")

fieldNames.description: Field names to display in the view as columns (for TABLE) or cards (for KANBAN/CALENDAR). Fields are displayed in the order provided. Use get_field_metadata to find available field names.
